arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ لِسَانَكَ عَنِ اللَّغْوِ وَالْخَوْضِ فِي أُمُورِ الدُّنْيَا فِيهِ
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ lisānaka ‘anil-laghwi wal-khawḍi fī umūrid-dunyā fīhi
englishTranslation: And guard your tongue from idle talk and engaging in worldly affairs therein.
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa lamiñ ci waxi àdduna ak wax yu daganadi ci biir jumaa.
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَ لَمِنْ سِ وَخِ اَدُّنَ اَكْ وَخْ يُ دَجَنَدِ سِ بِيرْ جُمَعْ

arabicText: وَأَكْثِرْ مِنَ الِاسْتِغْفَارِ وَالصَّلَاةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ الْهَادِي الْمُنْجِي
latinTransliteration: Wa akthir minal-istighfāri waṣ-ṣalāti ‘alan-Nabiyyil-Hādī-l-Munjī
englishTranslation: And increase in seeking forgiveness and blessing the Prophet, the Guide and Deliverer.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yokkal tuub te sotti julli ci Yonent bi, jubeel ki te fadd nu ca mbugal.
wolofalAjamiScript: يُكَّلْ تُوبْ تِ سُتِّ جُلِّ سِ يُونِࣺنْتْ بِ جُبِيلْ كِ تِ فَدْ نُ سَ مْبُجَلْ

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ التَّخَطِّي لِرِقَابِ النَّاسِ فِي حَلَقَاتِ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minat-takhaṭṭī li-riqābin-nāsi fī ḥalaqātil-‘ilmi wadh-dhikr
englishTranslation: And beware of stepping over the shoulders of people in circles of knowledge and remembrance.
wolofTranslationStandard: Moytul di wax ci kaw jami nit ñi ci biir jàng walla tudd Yàlla.
wolofalAjamiScript: مُيْتُلْ دِ وَخْ سِ كَوْ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سِ بِيرْ جَنْجْ وَلَّ تُدْ يَٚlَّ

arabicText: وَالْبَسْ ثِيَابًا نَقِيَّةً طَاهِرَةً كَمَا هُوَ شَأْنُ الْمُصَلِّينَ الْأَبْرَارِ
latinTransliteration: Wa-lbas thiyāban naqiyyatan ṭāhiratan kamā huwa sha'nul-muṣallīnal-abrār
englishTranslation: And wear pure, clean garments, as is the custom of the righteous who pray.
wolofTranslationStandard: Solal yére yu set te laab, niki jullit yu sell yi koy defe sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: صُلَلْ يِيرِ يُ سِتْ تِ لَابْ نِكِ جُلِّتْ يُ سِلْ يِ كُيْ دِفِ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ لِسَانَكَ عَنِ اللَّغْوِ وَالْخَوْضِ فِي أُمُورِ الدُّنْيَا فِيهِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ lisānaka ‘anil-laghwi wal-khawḍi fī umūrid-dunyā fīhi (5)
englishTranslation: And guard your tongue from idle talk and engaging in worldly affairs therein. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa lamiñ ci waxi àdduna ak wax yu daganadi ci biir jumaa. (Wers 5)

latinTransliteration: Wa akthir minal-istighfāri waṣ-ṣalāti ‘alan-Nabiyyil-Hādī-l-Munjī (6)
englishTranslation: And increase in seeking forgiveness and blessing the Prophet, the Guide and Deliverer. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yokkal tuub te sotti julli ci Yonent bi, jubeel ki te fadd nu ca mbugal. (Wers 6)

arabicText: وَالْبَسْ ثِيَابًا نَقِيَّةً طَاهِرَةً كَمَا هُوَ شَأْنُ الْمُصَلِّينَ الْأَبْرَارِ [52]
latinTransliteration: Wa-lbas thiyāban naqiyyatan ṭāhiratan kamā huwa sha'nul-muṣallīnal-abrār (52)
englishTranslation: And wear pure, clean garments, as is the custom of the righteous who pray. (Stanza 52)
wolofTranslationStandard: Solal yére yu set te laab, niki jullit yu sell yi koy defe sa sùnek. (Wers 52)
wolofalAjamiScript: صُلَلْ يِيرِ يُ سِتْ تِ لَابْ نِكِ جُلِّتْ يُ سِلْ يِ كُيْ دِفِ سَ سُنِكْ [52]

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ لِسَانَكَ عَنِ اللَّغْوِ وَالْخَوْضِ فِي أُمُورِ الدُّنْيَا فِيهِ [53]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ lisānaka ‘anil-laghwi wal-khawḍi fī umūrid-dunyā fīhi (53)
englishTranslation: And guard your tongue from idle talk and engaging in worldly affairs therein. (Stanza 53)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa lamiñ ci waxi àdduna ak wax yu daganadi ci biir jumaa. (Wers 53)
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَ لَمِنْ سِ وَخِ اَدُّنَ اَكْ وَخْ يُ دَجَنَدِ سِ بِيرْ جُمَعْ [53]

arabicText: وَأَكْثِرْ مِنَ الِاسْتِغْفَارِ وَالصَّلَاةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ الْهَادِي الْمُنْجِي [54]
latinTransliteration: Wa akthir minal-istighfāri waṣ-ṣalāti ‘alan-Nabiyyil-Hādī-l-Munjī (54)
englishTranslation: And increase in seeking forgiveness and blessing the Prophet, the Guide and Deliverer. (Stanza 54)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yokkal tuub te sotti julli ci Yonent bi, jubeel ki te fadd nu ca mbugal. (Wers 54)
wolofalAjamiScript: يُكَّلْ تُوبْ تِ سُتِّ جُلِّ سِ يُونِࣺنْتْ بِ جُبِيلْ كِ تِ فَدْ نُ سَ مْبُجَلْ [54]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ التَّخَطِّي لِرِقَابِ النَّاسِ فِي حَلَقَاتِ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ [55]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minat-takhaṭṭī li-riqābin-nāsi fī ḥalaqātil-‘ilmi wadh-dhikr (55)
englishTranslation: And beware of stepping over the shoulders of people in circles of knowledge and remembrance. (Stanza 55)
wolofTranslationStandard: Moytul di wax ci kaw jami nit ñi ci biir jàng walla tudd Yàlla. (Wers 55)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُيْتُلْ دِ وَخْ سِ كَوْ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سِ بِيرْ جَنْجْ وَلَّ تُدْ يَٚlَّ [55]

arabicText: وَالْبَسْ ثِيَابًا نَقِيَّةً طَاهِرَةً كَمَا هُوَ شَأْنُ الْمُصَلِّينَ الْأَبْرَارِ [56]
latinTransliteration: Wa-lbas thiyāban naqiyyatan ṭāhiratan kamā huwa sha'nul-muṣallīnal-abrār (56)
englishTranslation: And wear pure, clean garments, as is the custom of the righteous who pray. (Stanza 56)
wolofTranslationStandard: Solal yére yu set te laab, niki jullit yu sell yi koy defe sa sùnek. (Wers 56)
wolofalAjamiScript: صُلَلْ يِيرِ يُ سِتْ تِ لَابْ نِكِ جُلِّتْ يُ سِلْ يِ كُيْ دِفِ سَ سُنِكْ [56]

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ لِسَانَكَ عَنِ اللَّغْوِ وَالْخَوْضِ فِي أُمُورِ الدُّنْيَا فِيهِ [57]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ lisānaka ‘anil-laghwi wal-khawḍi fī umūrid-dunyā fīhi (57)

wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa lamiñ ci waxi àdduna ak wax yu daganadi ci biir jumaa. (Wers 57)

arabicText: وَأَكْثِرْ مِنَ الِاسْتِغْفَارِ وَالصَّلَاةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ الْهَادِي الْمُنْجِي [58]

wolofalAjamiScript: مُيْتُلْ دِ وَخْ سِ كَوْ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سِ بِيرْ جَنْجْ وَلَّ تُدْ يَٚlَّ [59]

arabicText: وَالْبَسْ ثِيَابًا نَقِيَّةً طَاهِرَةً كَمَا هُوَ شَأْنُ الْمُصَلِّينَ الْأَبْرَارِ [60]
latinTransliteration: Wa-lbas thiyāban naqiyyatan ṭāhiratan kamā huwa sha'nul-muṣallīnal-abrār (60)

wolofTranslationStandard: Solal yére yu set te laab, niki jullit yu sell yi koy defe sa sùnek. (Wers 60)
